content.en:
Since the hundreds of millions of Dao Era after the initial control of the Eternal Demon Pillar, Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed has become more and more powerful.

And as more and more Eternal Demon Pillars are controlled, the growth of the Eternal Dao Species is also accelerating.

At this time, the effect of the Eternal Demon Pillar enhancing the Eternal Dao Seed has surpassed that of the Evil Vine and the Soul Devouring Demon Flower.

And in the future, the effect of the Eternal Demon Pillar will far surpass that of the Evil Vine and the Soul Devouring Demon Flower.

"Give the evil vine to his son, in this way, his Eternal Dao Seed will continue to strengthen, his strength will steadily increase, and he can also quickly improve to the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm in the future!"

Of course.

He also had very high requirements for his son, and at least he had to raise the Eternal Dao Seed to the limit before he could be allowed to impact the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm.

......

The Endless Realm.

Ye Tian called Ye Xingchen to him, and then took out the evil vine. "Four-Zero-Zero"

"Xingchen, this is an evil vine, which can make the Eternal Dao Seed demonized, but it is useless against the Perfect-level Eternal Dao Seed, and it can also strengthen the Eternal Dao Seed. The evil vine is given to you, you are placed in the Eternal Dao Seed, but it must not be leaked out in the outside world, this kind of treasure is useful to the powerhouses of the Eternal Realm God Realm, once it is leaked, it will be troublesome!"

Ye Tian said.

"Father, I know!" Ye Xingchen took it excitedly.

He had obtained the Tree Heart Demon Seed before, so he naturally knew about this kind of treasure, but the Tree Heart Demon Seed refining the Eternal Dao Seed was too weak, and it was only aimed at improving the Eternal Dao Body.

But his Eternal Dao Body was complete, and he naturally needed to improve the Eternal Dao Species.

Now, with the Evil Punishment Vine, his Eternal Dao Seed could be quickly promoted.

Immediately, he fused the Evil Punishment Vine into the Eternal Dao Seed, and felt the Evil Punishment Vine refining and improving the Eternal Dao Seed.

"It's so good!"

Ye Xingchen was even more excited.

"Go ahead, and work hard to cultivate and improve the Eternal Dao Species. Remember, without my permission, you must not attack the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm. We are cultivating a perfect-level Eternal Dao Seed, and we should raise the Eternal Dao Seed to the limit, and then solidify the Eternal Dao Seed, so as not to waste our potential. Ye Tian admonished.

"Father, I understand!"

Ye Xingchen responded.

......

Unconsciously, hundreds of millions of years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian's control of the Eternal Dao Seed was closer, and the Eternal Dao Seed was promoted faster.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian Devoured the Spirit Demon Flower to his wife Xiao Yue, and asked Xiao Yue to strengthen the Eternal Dao Seed.

In this way, the wife can also grow the eternal path seed at the same time.

Eternal Yin Wind Belt.

In addition to besieging the Demon Seed Linyuan before, he mobilized a lot of copy bodies, and did not explore the Eternal Yin Wind Belt, and then he began to explore the Eternal Yin Wind Belt again.

He also wants to get a treasure similar to the Soul Devouring Demon Flower, even if he doesn't need it, he can use it for his daughter!

After all, if you have a son and wife, you have to have a daughter!

But.

The resource level of the Eternal Yin Wind Belt is not high, whether you can encounter a treasure similar to the Spirit Devouring Demon Flower depends on luck!

Ye Tian is not in a hurry, he looks for it slowly, if there is one, it doesn't matter if he doesn't, it's a big deal to wait for his son or wife's eternal Dao seed to be raised to the limit in the future, and then give the evil vine or the soul devouring demon flower to his daughter to use.

The years passed, and a long time passed.

this day.

Somewhere in the Eternal Yin Wind Belt, Ye Tian finally found a treasure similar to the Evil Vine and the Soul Devouring Demon Flower again, and it was also inside a lair of the Eternal Yin Spirit.

"It should be this kind of treasure that attracts the Eternal Yin Spirit!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Thundered!!!!

After some killing, Ye Tian killed all the eternal yin spirits here, and then he came to that treasure.

This treasure is a crimson stone, and it is not small.

Ye Tian used the Eternal Divine Mirror to identify it and learned the name of this stone.

【Eternal Blood Drop Stone】

This stone, as he guessed, is a treasure that can be transformed into an eternal Dao seed demon seed and helps to strengthen the eternal Dao seed, and the effect of the evil vine is almost the same, but whether it can compare to the effect of the evil vine has to be tested to know.

Ye Tian fused the Eternal Blood Drop Stone into the Eternal Dao Seed to see its effect.

Soon, the Eternal Blood Drop Stone was successfully fused, and then various materials were absorbed to strengthen Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed.

"It's pretty much the same!"

Ye Tian judged.

Then, he took this Eternal Blood Drop Stone to the Endless Realm, called his daughter Ye Xingyue, and then gave her the Eternal Blood Drop Stone.......

Ye Xingyue was naturally very excited to obtain the Eternal Blood Drop Stone, and happily went to improve the Eternal Dao Seed.

"Wife, son, and daughter, their Eternal Dao Species can all be improved quickly, although it is not as fast as my current ascension speed, but I don't know how many times faster than other Eternal Dao Realms!"

Ye Tian muttered.

His current goal is to raise the Eternal Dao Seed to its current limit, and he can collect some resources if he can, and if he can't, he can't collect them.

And just like that, the long years of stability passed.

......

The Terrans are developing, the Endless Realm is developing, and the entire Alliance of the Gods Kingdom is also developing.

During this period of time, the strength of the Alliance of the Kingdom of the Gods was recovering.

Although there are occasionally some veteran Eternal Dao Body powerhouses who have become demonic, there are more Eternal Dao Body powerhouses who have completed the Eternal Dao Body, and if there is no big change, the number of Eternal Dao Body powerhouses will increase.

Gradually, the billion-dollar solstice era passed.

For those Eternal Dao Realms, what is a mere billion Dao Era? It's just a short period of time.

But for Ye Tian, it has been a long time.

Moreover, he actually found another eternal national order.

This time, he is not ready to trade this Eternal State Decree, mainly because those Eternal Dao Realms of the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance are estimated to not be able to come up with treasures that are suitable for him, even if he takes out a treasure similar to the evil vine, he doesn't need 3.2 to ask for it!

So, prepare to keep this eternal decree for yourself!

this day.

Ye Tian called Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue to him and asked, "Xingchen, Xingyue, do you want to open up an eternal kingdom and become the lord of the country?"

As soon as Ye Xingchen heard this, he knew that his father should have found another Eternal National Order, so he said, "Father, have you obtained another Eternal National Order?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded, "I think that even if I take it out and trade it, I won't be able to trade anything good, and besides, I don't need other items now, it's a waste to keep them, if you want to, take them!"

"Father, I want to open up an eternal kingdom to play, now our human race is developing rapidly in the endless country, and the territory of only 20% is too little, I want to open up another eternal kingdom and settle some human races. Ye Xingchen said.
